title: OX11 7HJ, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/AP3542QE/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited   Installation name: Didcot Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/AP3542QE/A001   "
